dataset_inventory_list.title: Still Birth by Place of Occurrence in District (Urban)
dataset_inventory_list.short_description: District-wise urban still births classified by institutional, domiciliary, and combined totals with sex disaggregation.
dataset_inventory_list.long_description: Pilot dataset for DES cataloging portal. Structure inspired by GDC-style downloadable tabular data pages.

dataset_inventory_list.title: Still Birth by Place of Occurrence in District (Rural)
dataset_inventory_list.short_description: District-wise rural still births classified by institutional, domiciliary, and combined totals with sex disaggregation.
dataset_inventory_list.long_description: Second pilot dataset to validate scalable backend-table architecture and frontend dataset switching.
